empathetic_output.support_response: Please don't worry; we will do everything in our power to make sure your wife receives her special gift on time. Can you please provide us with some more details such as your name, address, phone number so we can assist you further?
empathetic_output.defactualized_prompt: I'm reaching out about my order <ORDER_ID> for <PRODUCT>, which I purchased as a birthday gift for my wife with express shipping. Unfortunately, when I opened the box in front of my family, I was surprised to find a coffee maker instead of <PRODUCT>. I'm extremely disappointed and concerned that I won't be able to get the correct item on time, as my wife's birthday is in just two days. I would appreciate it if you could look into this matter urgently and let me know the steps to get the correct item delivered to me as soon as possible.

formal_output.support_response: Our team will investigate promptly and work towards resolving the issue as quickly as possible. Thank you for choosing our store!
